name: Jatamansi
summary: It should be framed as a traditional aromatic rhizome with modest clinical depth.
description: It should be framed as a traditional aromatic rhizome with modest clinical depth.
safetyNotes: CNS-active potential; avoid stacking with sedatives, alcohol, sleep aids, antidepressants, or other psychoactive supplements without clinician review. Avoid pregnancy/breastfeeding use unless supervised.
interactions: Potential interaction concern with sedatives/CNS depressants
use clinician review for high-dose extracts or chronic use.

sources.title: Valeriana jatamansi: Bioactive Compounds and their Medicinal Uses
Nardostachys jatamansi: Phytochemistry, ethnomedicinal uses, and pharmacological activities: A comprehensive review
Endoperoxidases in biosynthesis of endoperoxide bonds

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Aromatic herb/spice forms and essential oils differ greatly and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Aromatic herb/spice forms and essential oils differ greatly and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
